# CWE-91 negative: typed XML marshaling avoids injection
lang: go
file: CWE-91-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/xml"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-91 XML Injection (mitigated)
func ImportProfile(c *gin.Context) {
	title := c.PostForm("title")
	body := c.PostForm("body")
	doc, err := xml.Marshal(struct {
		XMLName xml.Name `xml:"profile"`
		Title   string   `xml:"title"`
		Body    string   `xml:"body"`
	}{Title: title, Body: body})
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "xml"})
		return
	}
	var parsed struct {
		Title string `xml:"title"`
		Body  string `xml:"body"`
	}
	if err := xml.Unmarshal(doc, &parsed); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "xml"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"title": parsed.Title})
}
